prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution Iron Kingdoms inspired steampunk fantasy atlas. Terrain type: diverse_archipelago. Complex realistic coastlines on every major island: peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, lagoons, barrier islands, sea caves, reefs, shoals. Full Metal Fantasy mood, steam plumes, arcane lightning, no readable labels, no logos, no satellite style.
